compiled_state.title: RED test: sprint entry/exit validator structural boundary
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Overview
Write the failing structural boundary test for the sprint validator hooks. Per behavioral-testing-standard Rule 5: tests verify the validator sections are present in the sprint SKILL.md file.

## File Impact
- Create: tests/skills/test-preconditions-sprint-validator.sh

## TDD Requirement
Write test_sprint_validator_entry_section_present that checks sprint SKILL.md contains an entry validator invocation block (_dso_pv_entry_check).
Write test_sprint_validator_exit_section_present that checks sprint SKILL.md contains an exit validator invocation block (_dso_pv_exit_write).
Write test_sprint_validator_upstream_stage_is_impl_plan that checks the entry section references "implementation-plan" as the upstream stage name.
Write test_sprint_validator_zero_interaction that checks no interactive prompt pattern appears in the new validator sections.

Given/When/Then for test_sprint_validator_upstream_stage_is_impl_plan:
Given: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md is read
When: grepping for the upstream stage name in the _dso_pv_entry_check invocation
Then: "implementation-plan" appears as the second argument (exit 0)

## .test-index RED Markers Required
tests/skills/test-preconditions-sprint-validator.sh [test_sprint_validator_entry_section_present]
tests/skills/test-preconditions-sprint-validator.sh [test_sprint_validator_exit_section_present]
tests/skills/test-preconditions-sprint-validator.sh [test_sprint_validator_upstream_stage_is_impl_plan]
tests/skills/test-preconditions-sprint-validator.sh [test_sprint_validator_zero_interaction]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file tests/skills/test-preconditions-sprint-validator.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preconditions-sprint-validator.sh
- [ ] All 4 test functions are present
  Verify: grep -c "^test_sprint_validator_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preconditions-sprint-validator.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Tests FAIL before T6 is applied
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preconditions-sprint-validator.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL\|not found"
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED markers for all 4 functions
  Verify: grep -q '\[test_sprint_validator_entry_section_present\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
